serverInfo.name: agent-guard-mcp
serverInfo.description: Detects and prevents infinite agent loops — circuit breakers, pattern detection, and stuck-agent recovery for agentic systems
serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: register_agent
tools.description: Register an agent for loop monitoring with iteration limits and progress thresholds

tools.name: log_action
tools.description: Log an agent action for loop detection with rolling window tracking

tools.name: detect_loop
tools.description: Check if an agent is stuck in an infinite loop with confidence scoring

tools.name: set_circuit_breaker
tools.description: Configure auto-terminate or warn on repeated action patterns

tools.name: check_circuit_breaker
tools.description: Pre-flight check before executing a tool — should it proceed or be blocked?

tools.name: get_stuck_report
tools.description: Detailed stuck analysis with action history, token waste estimate, and recovery plan

tools.name: get_health_dashboard
tools.description: Overview of all monitored agents with loop risk scores

resources.description: List all monitored agents and their current status
